# chronosphere_collection (Resource)

A logical grouping of monitors, dashboards, SLOs, and other resources, typically aligned with a team or system. Provides a default notification policy for contained monitors and SLOs that do not explicitly reference one.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "chronosphere_collection" "infra" {
  name        = "Infrastructure Collection"
  description = "Collection of resources related to infrastructure services."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the collection. Can be changed after creation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Free-form description of the collection.
- `notification_policy_id` (String) ID of the default notification policy applied to monitors in this collection that do not explicitly reference one. Monitors that set their own `notification_policy_id` are not overridden.
- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the collection. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.
- `team_id` (String) ID of the team that owns this collection.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
